player.webAudioUnsupported:
Uxolo
Isiphequluli sakho asisekeli i-WebAudio.
Iziphequluli ezisekelwayo yi-Chrome, Firefox, Safari, ne-Edge

engines.bassoonDesc: Isekela kuphela i-.xm / .mod. Ibuyela emuva ku-Chiptune3 bese i-FFmpeg kwamanye amafomethi.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Iguqula zonke izinhlobo zomsindo zibe yi-MP3. Ukusekelwa okubanzi, ukuqala okuhamba kancane.
engines.chiptune3Desc: Isekela amafomethi we-tracker angaphezu kuka-20 (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Ibuyela emuva ku-FFmpeg kwamanye amafomethi.

settings.title: Izilungiselelo
settings.engineDesc: Khetha i-audio engine ozoyisebenzisa. I-Chiptune3 inconywa ukuthola ukusekelwa okuhle kakhulu kwe-tracker format.

intro.title: Umhlahlandlela

tutorialMock.labelActions: Londoloza ifayela · Umthombo we-ModArchive · Imethadatha yengoma
tutorialMock.legendEmpty: --- / 00 / … = Okungeni (akukho noti / akukho thuluzi / akukho mphumela)
tutorialMock.labelFilter: Imena yokudonsa: Konke / Okuthandwayo / Umlando | Ibhokisi lokusesha: sesha ngegama lefayela noma isihloko
tutorialMock.annotPlaylist: Chofoza kunoma yimuphi umugqa ukuze uqale ukudlala · Umugqa ngamunye ukhombisa: inombolo · isihloko · ifomethi · iziteshi · usayizi · igama lefayela
tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Inkinhlamodi yevidiyo ngokujwayelekile ikhombisa isithonjana kuphela — ukuchofoza kushintsha phakathi kwezindlela zokudlala ezine
tutorialMock.annotScopes: Amagama omsakazo ngomzila ngamunye — umugqa ngamunye ukhombisa igagasi lesikhathi sangempela lomzila womsindo owodwa
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: Chofoza "Fometha" ukuvula iphaneli yokukhetha okuningi · Izihlungi zokudonsela phansi kwesiteshi/Usayizi · Ukuhlunga ngezinkambu eziningi
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Ukubhalisa kwamahhala · Kugcinwa izintandokazi nomlando kuphela · Akukho ukulandelelwa, akukho zikhangiso

intro.tutorialStep5Body: Dala i-akhawunti yamahhala ukuze uvule izici ezengeziwe:
intro.introWelcome: Isango lakho lokujabulela umculo we-tracker ngezindlela ezingaphezu kuka-68 — kusukela ku-MOD ne-XM ezidumile kuya ku-MPTM ne-UMX zanamuhla — kusukela eqoqweni elikhulu
intro.tutorialStep3Body: I-Tracker Player iletha umculo ube phila ngemiboniso emibili ehambisanayo yesikhathi sangempela:
intro.tutorialLead: Lo mhlahlandlela ukukuhambisa kuzo zonke izici ze-Tracker Player, kusukela ekutholeni ithrekhi yakho yokuqala kuya ekwenzeni umdlali ube ngokwezidingo zakho zokusebenza.
intro.tutorialStep1Body: I-playlist iyinhliziyo ye-Tracker Player. Sebenzisa ibha yokusesha phezulu ukuthola amathrekhi ngegama lefayela noma isihloko. Ngaphansi kwebha yokusesha, uzothola iqoqo elinamandla lezihlungi:
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Chofoza noma iyiphi ithrekhi kuhlu lokudlala ukuze uqale ukudlala. Isidlali silayisha ngokushesha — amafayela amaningi aqala ukudlala ngaphansi komzuzwana. Ngenkathi ithrekhi idlala, uzobona:
intro.tutorialStep4Body: I-Tracker Player iyathandeka kakhulu. Finyelela izilungiselelo ngesithonjana segiya (ibha engenhla) noma nge-Settings ear (isidlakathi sobunxele):
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Ithiphu elihle: Kumakhalekhukhwini, engeza i-Tracker Player esikrinini sakho sasekhaya ukuze uthole ulwazi olufana nohlelo lokusebenza lomdabu. Isebenza kahle kakhulu njenge-Progressive Web App enokugcina okungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi.
intro.changelogIntro: I-Tracker Player iguquke kakhulu kusukela ekuqaleni kwayo njengomdlali we-MOD/XM olula. Nansi uhlu lwezikhathi zezinto ezinkulu ezenzekile:
intro.introWhatBody1: I-Tracker Player ingumsebenzi womuntu siqu ovulekile ohloselwe ukuletha ubuhle bomculo we-tracker kusiphequluli sesimanje. Akusiyo injini yomsindo entsha, kodwa ukuhlanganiswa okujulile nokuthuthukiswa kwesibili okwakhelwe phezu kwamaphrojekthi avulekile akhona, okudala uhlelo oluphelele lokuhlangenwe nakho komsebenzisi.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Kuze kwanamuhla, umculo we-tracker uyaqhubeka nokuchuma emphakathini womhlaba wonke we-demoscene kanye naphakathi kwabathandi bekhompyutha zakudala. I-Tracker Player inethemba lokwethula abantu abaningi kule ndlela yobuciko eyingqayizivele ethwele umlando womculo wekhompyutha, ngokusebenzisa isikhombisi-msebenzi sesimanje nokusebenzisana okulula.
intro.introWelcomeNote: I-Tracker Player ingaphezu nje komdlali — iyinkundla yomculo we-tracker enezici eziphelele enesithombe esihle, esiphendulayo, ukubonwa kwephethini ngesikhathi sangempela, ama-oscilloscope wesiteshi ngasinye, kanye neqoqo lamathuluzi aklanyelwe ukwenza ukuthola nokujabulela umculo we-tracker kube lula kunoma iyiphi idivayisi.
intro.introWhatBody3: Kusukela ekusesheni nasekuhlungeni kohlu lwamaculo, ukubonwa komsindo, izinhlelo zama-akhawunti omsebenzisi kuya ekusekelweni kwamazwe ngamazwe, i-Tracker Player yakhe uhlelo oluphelele lwezici ezingaphandle ezizungeze umnyombo womdlali, ngenhloso yokuvumela abasebenzisi bajabulele ubuhle obuhlukile bomculo we-tracker ngaphandle kwaso noma yisiphi isizinda sobuchwepheshe.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Wonke ithrekhi ku-Tracker Player inesixhumanisi esihlala njalo, esabelwanayo. Kopisha isixhumanisi kubha yekheli lesiphequluli sakho ngenkathi ithrekhi idlala — izobukeka njenge /song/123456/filename.mod. Yithumelela kubangani, uyithumele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, noma uyibhukhumakele kamuva. Isixhumanisi siyohlala sivula ithrekhi efanayo.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , i-browser-based Amiga MOD/XM tracker ebhalwe nge-JavaScript emsulwa ngu-Steffest, ephinda idlala ngokwethembeka umuzwa wokudlala we-tracker wakudala. Ngokwakhela phezu kwalesi sisekelo, iphrojekthi yahlanganisa kancane kancane i-Chiptune3 (i-WebAssembly engine eyenziwe ngokwezifiso esekelwe ku-libopenmpt) kanye ne-FFmpeg server-side transcoding, yandisa ukwesekwa kwefomethi kusukela ku-MOD/XM yasekuqaleni kuya kumafomethi angaphezu kuka-68.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Umculo we-tracker (owaziwa nangokuthi umculo we-module noma umculo we-MOD) uhlobo oluhlukile lomculo wedijithali olwavela ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1980 ku-Commodore Amiga. Ngokungafani nama-MP3 noma umculo osakazwayo, amafayela e-tracker aqukethe kokubili amanothi omculo (amanothi, amaphethini, imiphumela) kanye namasampula ezinsimbi — njengefayela lomculo elizimele. Lokhu kwenza amafayela e-tracker abe mncane ngokuphawulekayo ngenkathi evumela ubunkimbinkimbi obumangalisayo bomculo.
intro.creditsIntro: I-Tracker Player yakhelwe phezu kwamahlombe omhlaba omuhle kakhulu womthombo ovulekile. Yonke imtapo yethu yezingoma ezingaphezu kuka-135,400 ithathwe ku-The Mod Archive — umtapo oqinisekisiwe we-inthanethi womculo we-tracker. Siyabonga kakhulu kubo bonke abanikeli abenza lo msebenzi waba nokwenzeka.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: I-Vue.js meta-framework enika amandla ethu wonke angaphambili nangemuva. I-Nuxt inikezela ngokuhlela ohlangothini lweseva ukuze amakhasi alayishe ngokushesha kanye ne-SEO, iseva ye-Nitro yemizila ye-API, ukuhlanganiswa kwesizindalwazi se-SQLite, nokuhlukaniswa kwekhodi okuzenzakalelayo ukuze kusebenze kahle.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Uhlaka lwe-JavaScript oluqhubekayo olusetshenziselwa i-UI yethu esekelwe ezingxenyeni. I-Vue's Composition API, uhlelo lokusabela, nezingxenye zefayela elilodwa zenze kwaba nokwenzeka ukwakha nokugcina isixhumi esiyinkimbinkimbi somdlali ngekhodi ehlanzekile, ehlukanisiwe.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Ithuluzi lokuhlanganisa elisekelwe ku-LLVM elihlanganisa ikhodi ye-C/C++ ibe yi-WebAssembly. Sisebenzisa i-Emscripten ukuhlanganisa i-libopenmpt yethu enezichibiyelo — kuhlanganise ne-waveform_processor eyenziwe ngokwezifiso — ibe imojuli ye-WASM yefayela elilodwa esebenza ngesivinini esiseduze nesemvelo ngaphakathi kwe-AudioWorklet yesiphequluli.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: I-repository yokuphambili ye-inthanethi yomculo olandelwayo, enezinhlamvu ezingaphezu kuka-150,000 ezivela ezinkulungwaneni zabaculi emashumini eminyaka amane. I-Mod Archive ingumthombo oyedwa womculo emtatsheni wethu wezincwadi futhi iyisikhungo esingenakushintshwa emphakathini wokulandela umculo.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: I-W3C Web Audio API specification evumela ukucubungula umsindo ophansi kakhulu, ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka, emgqeni othile we-real-time. I-AudioWorklet yilapho injini yethu ye-Chiptune3 isebenzisa i-libopenmpt WASM ehlanganisiwe, ngaphandle komgqomo oyinhloko we-UI, iqinisekisa ukudlala okushelelayo noma ngabe yini eyenziwa yi-interface.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Uhlaka lwe-CSS olusebenzisa izinsiza eziyisisekelo olusetshenziselwa ukuhlela. Uhlelo lwamathokheni omklamo lwe-Tailwind lwenza ukuthi ukwakheka kwethu kwezihloko eziyi-16 kusebenze — wonke umbala, isithunzi, kanye nomngcele kuyavumelana nesihloko esisebenzayo ngezakhiwo zangokwezifiso ze-CSS ezikhiqizwe ekucushweni kwethu kwe-Tailwind.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Idalwe nguSteffest. Ukusetshenziswa kabusha okuthembekile okusekelwe kusiphequluli se-classic Amiga MOD kanye ne-XM trackers — i-ProTracker ne-FastTracker II — ebhalwe ngokuphelele nge-JavaScript. I-BassoonTracker inikeza ukudlala okuyiqiniso, okufudumele okuqale le phrojekthi, ngokusekelwa okugcwele kwama-MOD ama-4-channel ama-classic kanye nama-XM ama-multi-channel afaka ama-envelopes, izihlungi, kanye nemiphumela.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Ifomethi yasungulwa nguKarsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker ngo-1987, futhi yathuthuka ngokushesha nge-demoscene — isiko elincane elinempilo lapho abahleli bezinhlelo, abaculi, namaciko bancintisana ukudala imisebenzi ekhangayo yomsindo nezithombe. Emashumini eminyaka, kwavela izinhlobo eziningi zama-tracker, ngayinye iqhubekisela phambili imingcele yalokho okwakungenzeka: iziteshi ezengeziwe, imiphumela engcono, izinsimbi ezihlanganisiwe, ukusekelwa kwe-VST plugin, ngisho namandla okuxuba aphelele. Namuhla, umkhakha wama-tracker usasebenza emhlabeni wonke, nomculo omusha ukhishwa nsuku zonke kumasayithi afana ne-The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: I-API yegrafikhi yomhloli evumela ukubonwa kwephethini yethrekhi yesikhathi sangempela. Imininingwane yamanothi ephethini ihanjiswa kumkhakha we-WebGL nge-60 fps, ikhiqiza ngokwethembeka ukubukeka kwamanothi okuskrola kwabahleli bethrekhi bakudala njenge-ProTracker ne-FastTracker II.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Yenziwe nguDrSnuggles — umtapo weJavaScript ovulekile ohlanganisa i-libopenmpt ku-AudioWorklet ukuze kudlalwe amafomethi angaphezu kuka-68 kusiphequluli. Kule projekthi, sihlele ukucubungula kwe-AudioWorklet ukuze sikhiphe idatha yamagagasi esiteshini ngasinye (okunika amandla ama-oscilloscope amaningi), sengeza ukulawulwa kwenzuzo okuzenzakalelayo, futhi saqinisa ukuphathwa kwezimo zokugijima ukuze kushintshwe amathrekhi ngokushesha. I-Chiptune3 isebenza njengebhuloho phakathi kwe-Web Audio API yesiphequluli namandla okuhumusha we-libopenmpt yethu elungisiwe, futhi iyinjini yethu eyinhloko enconyiwe.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Yakhiwa ngabanikeli be-OpenMPT. Umtapo wezincwadi wokudlala umculo ovulekile, osekelwa izinhlobo ezingaphezu kuka-68 zamafomethi ngokunemba okungenakuqhathaniswa. Siguqule umthombo wekhodi ye-C ye-libopenmpt — sengeza i-waveform_processor eyenziwe ngokwezifiso ethatha idatha ye-PCM yesiteshi ngasinye ngaphakathi kumxube ngaphambi komphumela wokugcina — futhi sayihlanganisa ku-WebAssembly nge-Emscripten. Ukwakhiwa kwethu kwe-WASM okulungisiwe kungena esikhundleni se-binary eyakhiwe ngaphambilini ehlanganiswe ne-Chiptune3, inika amandla ama-oscilloscope esiteshi ngasinye futhi yakha umgogodla wokuhumusha wazo zonke izinhlobo ezingaphezu kuka-68 zamafomethi.
tutorialStep1Filters: Isihluzo Lwefomethi — Chofoza ukuze uvule igridi yokukhetha okuningi yawo wonke amafomethi atholakalayo. Sebenzisa izinkinobho ezimisiwe ukuze ukhethe ngokushesha amaqembu: I-Bassoon (MOD/XM), I-Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), I-Chiptune3 Yonke (amafomethi angu-56), noma Konke Okusekelwe.
Isihlungi Seziteshi — Hlanganisa ngenani leziteshi: iziteshi ezi-4 (inkathi ye-MOD yakudala), iziteshi ezi-8, noma iziteshi ezi-8+ (i-multitrack yesimanje).
Isihlungo Sobukhulu — Hlunga ngosayizi wefayela: elincane (<100KB), eliphakathi, noma elikhulu (>1MB).
Isihlungi Segama Le-Tracker — Thayina igama le-tracker (isb., "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") ukuze uthole umculo owenziwe ngesofthiwe ethile.
Izinketho Zokuhlunga — Hlela uhlu lokudlala nge-ID, isihloko, igama lefayela, usayizi, noma usuku lokuguqulwa, ngokukhuphuka noma ngokwehla.
Isikhethi Somthombo — Shintsha phakathi kwawo wonke amathrekhi, Intandokazi yakho, kanye noMlando Wakho Wokudlala.
tutorialStep2Details: Ulwazi Lwengoma — Isihloko, umculi, ifomethi, inani leziteshi, kanye nenombolo yengoma ekhonjiswe ngaphezu kwezilawuli zomdlali.

Dlala/Misa & Ukuzulazula — Inkinobho enkulu yokudlala/yokumisa enomkhethi wemodi yokudlala: Hlanganisa (ngokungahleliwe), Ngokulandelana (ngokulandelana), Phindaphinda Okukodwa, noma Misa Ngemva Kwamanje.
Ilanda elilandelayo — Yeqa uye kwingoma elandelayo ngesandla, noma vumela indlela yakho yokudlala ekhethiweyo iyiphathe.
Ivolumu & Inqubekela — Lungisa ivolumu ngesilayidi, sesha ithrekhi, bese ubona isikhathi esidlulile/esisele.
Inkinhla Inhliziyo — Chofoza inhliziyo ukuze ungeze ithrekhi kwezintandokazi zakho (idinga i-akhawunti).
Landa — Gcina ifayela lomkhondo langempela kudivayisi yakho.
Isixhumanisi se-ModArchive — Vula ikhasi lethrekhi ku-Mod Archive ukuze uthole umongo owengeziwe kanye namazwana omphakathi.

Imininingwane Yengoma Yomculo — Buka imininingwane eningiliziwe: igama lomlandi, usuku, ubude besikhathi, uhlobo lwesitsha, izingoma ezingaphansi, inani leziteshi, izinsimbi, amasampula, ama-oda, amaphethini, kanye nanoma yimuphi umlayezo oshumekiwe ovela kumqambi.
tutorialStep3Details: Ukubuka Kwephethini — Bona idatha yangempela yephethini yomkhondo ihamba ngesikhathi sangempela, inikezwe nge-WebGL ukuze isebenze kahle kakhulu. Ikholomu ngayinye imele isiteshi, umugqa ngamunye umcimbi wenothi. Amanothi, izinsimbi, umthamo, kanye nemiyalo yomphumela konke kuyaboniswa — njengakuhleli lwe-tracker yakudala. Chofoza ukushintsha kwephethini ukuze ushintshe phakathi kwezindlela eziqondile (zendabuko) nezivundlile (isikrini esibanzi).

I-Oscilloscopes Zomunye Isiteshi — Ngaphansi komdlali, uzobona igridi yezibonisi zamaza — eyodwa yesiteshi ngasinye somsakazo kuthrekhi. Lezi zinikwa amandla umqhubekisi wethu wamaza we-C-level owenziwe ngokwezifiso owakhelwe ku-libopenmpt, okhipha umsindo wesiteshi ngasinye ngaphambi kokuhlanganiswa kokugcina. Buka amaza esiteshi ngasinye ehamba ngesikhathi sangempela, ekunikeza umkhondo obonakalayo wokuthi umculo wakhiwe kanjani — isigubhu somlenze esiteshini 1, i-bass esiteshini 2, umholi esiteshini 3, nokunye.
Kokubonisa zombili lezi zibonwa zingavulwa/kuvalwa ku-Settings ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza noma ukukhetha.
tutorialStep4Settings: Ishayini Yokudlala — Khetha phakathi kwe-BassoonTracker (i-MOD/XM yakudala), i-Chiptune3 (enconywayo, amafomethi angaphezu kuka-20), noma i-FFmpeg (ukusekelwa kwefomethi ebanzi ngokuguqulwa ohlangothini lweseva).

Ithemu — Khetha kumatimu emibala ayi-16. Amatimu akhanyayo afaka i-Light, i-Retro (Solarized), i-Ocean (Teal), i-Forest (Green), i-Strawberry (Pink), i-Blue, i-Pink, i-Cyan, i-Orange, ne-Gray. Amatimu amnyama afaka i-Dark, i-Midnight (Deep Purple), i-Golden (Black & Gold), i-Purple, i-Red, ne-Green.
Ulimi — Izilimi ezingama-52 zokusebenzisana. Ukukhetha kwakho kugcinwa endaweni.
Ivolumu — Seta izinga levolumu elijwayelekile futhi ngokuzithandela uliphoqelele kuyo yonke ithrekhi.
Ukulinganisa Ukuzwakala Komsindo — Lungisa ngokuzenzakalelayo ivolumu yokudlala ukuze kube nokulalela okungaguquki (kuvuliwe ngokuzenzakalelayo).
Ubuningi Bomjikeleko Omkhulu — Izingoma ze-Tracker zivame ukujikeleka unomphela. Setha ubuningi bomjikeleko ukuze uvimbele ukudlala okungapheli (okuzenzakalelayo: 1).
Izinketho Zokubonisa — Bonisa noma fihla ukubonwa kobubanzi, ukubukwa kwephethini, kanye nesigaba sokuqalisa.
tutorialStep5Details: Izintandokazi — Hlanganisa noma iyiphi ingoma ukuze uyigcine ohlwini lwakho lwezintandokazi, olutholakala kusikhethi somthombo wohlu lokudlala.
Umlando Wokudlala — Wonke umculo owudlalayo uqoshwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Phekula umlando wakho ukuze uthole kabusha amaculo.
Ukuvumelanisa Kwemishini Ehlukene — Izintandokazi zakho nomlando wakho kuyakulandela kuzo zonke izimishini uma ungene ngemvume.
Ubumfihlo — I-akhawunti yakho igcina izintandokazi nomlando kuphela. Ayikho idatha yomuntu siqu eqoqwayo noma eyabiwe.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Umtapo wezifayili zomculo we-tracker eziyi-135,400+ ezihlanganisa amafomethi angu-68+, kusukela kuma-MOD aneziteshi ezi-4 kuya kuma-epic aneziteshi eziyi-256.

Ukwakhiwo kwezinjini ezintathu: i-BassoonTracker (i-JS yakudala), i-Chiptune3 (i-AudioWorklet + i-libopenmpt WASM), ne-FFmpeg (ukuguqula ohlangothini lweseva) — ikhethwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngefayela ngalinye.
Ukubuka kwephethini yomkhondo wesikhathi sangempela okwenziwe ku-WebGL — bukela amanothi ehla njengakuhleli lwakudala lomkhondo.
I-oscilloscope yamagrafu lesiteshi lesiteshi — bona ukuphuma komsindo wesiteshi ngasinye njenge-waveform egijimayo ebukhoma, enikwa amandla ukukhishwa kwe-waveform okwenziwe nge-C-level.
Idizayini ephendulayo evumelana kahle naso sonke isikrini: ideskithophu, ithebhulethi, noma ifoni — kuhlanganise nemodi yephethini evundlile yesikrini esibanzi.
Izihloko zemibala ezi-16 ezenziwe ngobuciko — kusukela ekukhanyeni okucacile kuya ebumnyameni obujulile, i-solarized retro, igolide efudumele, nakho konke okuphakathi.
Izilimi ezingama-52 zokusebenzisa isikhombi-mculo — ukwenza umculo wokulandelela ufinyeleleke kubalaleli emhlabeni wonke.

Ukusesha okunamandla, isihlungi sefomethi yokukhetha okuningi enezinkinobho ezimisiwe (i-Bassoon, i-Major Tracker, i-Chiptune3, konke okusekelwayo), isihlungi senani lesiteshi, nokuhlunga ngezinkambu eziningi.
Uhlelo lwe-akhawunti olunokuthandwa kanye nomlando wokudlala — vumelanisa umtapo wakho kuwo wonke amadivayisi akho.
Izixhumanisi ezingapheliyo ezingabelwana ngezingoma — ingoma ngayinye ithola i-URL eyingqayizivele efana ne-/song/123456/filename.mod.
Landa amafayili omkhondo wokuqala noma uguqulele ku-MP3 ngokuchofoza okukodwa.
Iphanikitha yolwazi lwethrekhi ekhombisa imininingwane: isihloko, umculi, umlandeli, ifomethi, iziteshi, izinsimbi, amasampula, ama-oda, amaphethini, kanye nomyalezo ofakiwe.
Ikhululekile ngokuphelele, umthombo ovulekile, futhi uqhutshwa umphakathi — azikho izikhangiso, akukho ukulandelela, azikho izindonga zokukhokha.
